entries.name: custom_biome_definition
entries.description: Define a custom biome with colors and climate settings

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Unique biome ID (lowercase, no spaces, use underscores)

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Namespace for the biome key (default: typewriter)

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Base vanilla biome to inherit properties from (e.g., 'minecraft:plains', 'minecraft:forest')

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Temperature value (0.0 = cold/snowy, 0.5 = temperate, 2.0 = hot). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Downfall/humidity value (0.0 = dry, 1.0 = wet/rainy). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Fog color in hex format (#RRGGBB). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Water color in hex format (#RRGGBB). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Underwater fog color in hex format (#RRGGBB). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Sky color in hex format (#RRGGBB). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Foliage/leaf color in hex format (#RRGGBB). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Grass color in hex format (#RRGGBB). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Dry foliage color for badlands/savanna in hex format (#RRGGBB). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Sunrise/sunset sky tint color in hex format (#RRGGBB). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Cloud color in hex format (#RRGGBB). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Skylight color tint in hex format (#RRGGBB). Leave empty to inherit from base biome.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Distance where fog starts

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Distance where fog ends

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Distance where sky fog ends

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Distance where water fog starts

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Distance where water fog ends

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Distance where cloud fog ends

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Height of the clouds

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Multiplier for sky light brightness

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Sun angle (0.0 = overhead)

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Moon angle

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Star angle

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Star brightness

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Moon phase (full_moon, waning_gibbous, etc)

entries.name: enter_biome_event
entries.description: Triggered when a player enters a biome

modifiers.data: The entries that will be fired after this entry.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: The entries that will be fired after this entry.

modifiers.name: entry
modifiers.data: triggerable

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Biome identifiers to trigger on (empty = any biome). Examples: 'minecraft:plains', 'typewriter:my_biome'

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: If true, ignore missing biome identifiers instead of throwing errors

entries.name: leave_biome_event

modifiers.data: triggerable

modifiers.data: Biome identifiers to trigger when leaving (empty = any biome). Examples: 'minecraft:plains', 'typewriter:my_biome'

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: If true, ignore missing biome identifiers instead of throwing errors

entries.name: player_biome_fact
entries.description: Expose the player's current biome as a fact value

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: A comment to keep track of what this fact is used for.

modifiers.data: A comment to keep track of what this fact is used for.

modifiers.name: entry
modifiers.data: group

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: If left empty, every player has its own group.

modifiers.data: If left empty, every player has its own group.

modifiers.data: Mode for determining the fact value

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Biome identifiers for BOOLEAN mode. Returns 1 if player is in any of these biomes, 0 otherwise.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Biome to code mapping for CODE mode. Returns the code for the current biome.

modifiers.name: help

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: If true, ignore missing biome identifiers instead of throwing errors

entries.name: biome_audience
entries.description: Filter players based on the biome they are standing in

modifiers.name: entry
modifiers.data: audience

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Biome identifiers to filter on. Examples: 'minecraft:plains', 'typewriter:my_biome'

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: If true, ignore missing biome identifiers instead of throwing errors

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: If true, only include players in custom biomes (ignores biome list)

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: The audience will be the players that do not match the criteria.

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: The audience will be the players that do not match the criteria.

entries.name: current_biome_variable
entries.description: Returns the player's current biome name

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Format for the output: ID returns 'namespace:key', NAME returns readable name

entries.name: biome_property_variable
entries.description: Returns a property of the player's current biome

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Which property to return

entries.name: custom_biome_list_variable
entries.description: Returns a list of registered custom biomes

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Separator between biome names (default: ', ')

modifiers.name: help
modifiers.data: Format for each biome: ID or NAME

extension.name: CustomBiome
extension.shortDescription: Create and manage custom biomes with full color and climate customization.
extension.description: Typewriter extension module providing additional entries for the Typewriter plugin ecosystem. Supports Paper and Folia server platforms with full feature parity. This module extends the core functionality with specialized entries. Compatible with the official Typewriter engine and designed for standalone use.
